name: Asian Cabbage Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil in a wok or large deep skillet over low heat for 1 minute.
2. Meanwhile, shred the cabbage finely and add it to the pan. Stir fry for 4 minutes until the cabbage is tender but still crisp.
3. Add sesame seeds and stir fry for an additional 1 minute.
4. Finally, add teriyaki sauce and toss all ingredients together until well combined.
5. Makes 4 servings.
